HGSS.127.0001:
Clair: I’m sorry about this.
Here, take this as my apology.\f
HGSS.127.0003:
That contains Dragon Pulse.\f
Well, Dragon Pulse is a kind of er...
never mind!\f
It’s huge energy of some kind.
If you don’t want it, you don’t\r
have to take it.\f
HGSS.127.0004:
Oh? You don’t have any room for this.\f
I’m going back to the Gym, so make
room, then come see me there.\f
HGSS.127.0005:
What’s the matter?
If you are headed to the Pokémon\r
League, go back to New Bark Town\r
and Surf along Route 27.\f
Your face...is telling me you have
some unfinished business...\f
Come on!\f
Whatever you have to face from now,
don’t you dare give up!\f
If you do, I’ll feel even worse
about having lost to you!\r
Give it your all.\f
HGSS.127.0006:
Dragon Shrine\f
A shrine revering the Dragon Pokémon
said to have lived in Dragon’s Den.
HGSS.127.0007:
[0103,0001,0000]: ...
What? [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Yeah, I am training my Pokémon here.
You can laugh at me now...\f
But it needs to be done.
My Pokémon aren’t ready to beat you.\r
I can’t push them too hard now.\f
I have to be disciplined to become
the greatest Pokémon Trainer...
HGSS.127.0008:
[0103,0001,0000]: ...\f
Whew...\f
Learn to stay out
of my way...
HGSS.127.0009:
Clair: It’s still early, and you’ve got
nothing to do already?\f
I may have time to listen to you.
If you insist, I can exchange\r
numbers, too! [0200,0000]
HGSS.127.0011:
Clair: I can battle you on Friday
nights if you insist!
HGSS.127.0013:
Clair: So you do want to
exchange numbers? [0200,0000]
HGSS.127.0014:
[0103,0001,0000]: ...What?
Are you here to make fun of\r
my training?\f
Humph!
I took my time coming all the way here,\f
but the Master won’t tell me anything,
and he’s making a big deal out of it...\f
So I decided to train my Pokémon
here instead.\f
HGSS.127.0015:
Lance: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
And...you.\r
We met at the Team Rocket hideout.\f
HGSS.127.0016:
Lance: Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
And...you.\r
We met at the Team Rocket hideout.\f
HGSS.127.0017:
[0103,0001,0000]: You!
Where have you been all this time?\f
Prepare to lose to me this time.
I challenge you!\f
HGSS.127.0018:
Lance: Calm down.
I was in a bit of a hurry then.\f
Sorry for that.
But...I always welcome challengers!\f
Hey!
How about a Double Battle?\f
HGSS.127.0019:
[0103,0001,0000]: Humph!
You can’t beat me one-on-one, can you?\f
HGSS.127.0020:
Lance: Come on.
A Double Battle is really not bad.\r
[0103,0000,0000], you’ll be on my side!\f
HGSS.127.0021:
Lance: Come on.
A Double Battle is really not bad.\r
[0103,0000,0000], you’ll be on my side!\f
HGSS.127.0022:
Clair: Well then, you over there!
Will you team up with me?\f
HGSS.127.0023:
[0103,0001,0000]: You must be kidding!\f
That embarrassing one in the weird
costume for me?\r
No way I can battle with her!\f
HGSS.127.0024:
[0103,0000,0000]!
Come to my side!\r
We’ll beat Lance together!\f
HGSS.127.0025:
Lance: Just as I expected.
You two make quite a team...\f
Going solo is certainly one way to aim
for the top...\f
But that’s not all there is to Pokémon
battle. Although I don’t feel it’s\r
necessary to remind you guys.\f
See you, [0103,0000,0000],
another time!\f
HGSS.127.0026:
Lance: Just as I expected.
You two make quite a team...\f
Going solo is certainly one way to aim
for the top...\f
But that’s not all there is to Pokémon
battle. Although I don’t feel it’s\r
necessary to remind you guys.\f
See you, [0103,0000,0000],
another time!\f
HGSS.127.0027:
Clair: I must excuse myself.\f
...[0103,0000,0000], it was a fun battle.\f
That goes for you, too, wise guy.\f
HGSS.127.0028:
[0103,0001,0000]: [0103,0000,0000]...\f
It wasn’t supposed to go this way...
Anyway, I am not giving up beating you!\f
I’ll train my Pokémon and...my own
heart, too.\f
I’ll come back as the toughest
challenge for you!\f
HGSS.127.0029:
Clair: You...
seem desperate to take pictures\r
with me. [0200,0000]
HGSS.127.0031:
Clair: Excellent one of me!
Another cool picture.
HGSS.127.0033:
Your Photo Album is full.\f
Access your PC and delete
some pictures.
